description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, symmetrical design. The axe features two large, curved blades on either side of a central, octagonal hub, each blade having a cut-out lattice pattern and a slightly rough, metallic texture. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and wrapped in a dark material, possibly leather, with gold-colored bands and a rounded pommel at the base. The central hub and blade attachment points are reinforced with gold-colored, hexagonal fasteners, adding both structural integrity and decorative flair. The overall color palette is dominated by black and dark metallic tones, with subtle gold accents. The axe appears heavy and formidable, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application.
description: A double-headed battle axe with black, lattice-patterned blades, a straight dark handle, and gold accent bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, curved blades with lattice cut-outs and the central octagonal hub.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the straight, cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical blade design and gold fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle wrapped in dark leather with gold accent bands and a rounded pommel; likely wood core.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, curved blades with lattice cut-outs, symmetrical, with octagonal central hub and gold fasteners.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with visible gold fasteners at the hub.
